title: erigeron × benzii
intro: Erigeron × benzii, also known as the hybrid daisy or snow-in-summer, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Erigeron × benzii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, and to reduce the severity of respiratory problems like asthma and bronchitis. Erigeron × benzii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
